title: Button
summary: Launch one or more URLs from a compact icon button, including stack-friendly shortcuts.

title: Search
summary: Search the web from your dashboard with configurable providers.

title: Timer
summary: Show time, date, greeting, timezone, and display preferences.

title: Weather
summary: Show live weather from Open-Meteo, WeatherAPI.com, or OpenWeatherMap.

title: Calendar
summary: Keep the current date and calendar context visible in your dashboard.

title: Stack
summary: Group button widgets into compact horizontal or vertical launch panels.

title: Docker Status
summary: Monitor Docker container state from a configured Docker host endpoint.

title: Fetch
summary: Fetch arbitrary HTTP content and format the response for display.

title: Website
summary: Embed an external website or service page directly in a widget frame.

title: DeepSeek
summary: Display DeepSeek account balance and token usage information.

title: YouTube
summary: Track uploads or livestream status for configured YouTube channels.

title: RSS
summary: Render feed items from one or more RSS sources in list or card layouts.

title: Stock
summary: Track equities, ETFs, crypto pairs, and market movement at a glance.

title: GitHub Repo
summary: Show repository stars, forks, open pull requests, and open issues.
